title: "Our Gathering Together Unto Him" II Thessalonians 2:1

notes.introduction: An exposition of 2 Thessalonians 2:1 on the phrase 'our gathering together unto him,' tracing a single Greek word used only twice in the New Testament to connect the present assembling of the local church (Hebrews 10:24-25) with the future rapture gathering described in 1 Thessalonians 4:13-17.

sections.heading: Background: Paul and the Thessalonian Church
A Greek Word Used Only Twice
The Current Gathering: Purpose and Practice
Provoking to Love and Good Works
Reunion, Transience, and the Permanent Gathering
